title: Role Assignment
description: Read-only view of VistA security keys and role assignments for users within a tenant. VistA keys (File 200 KEYS field) and security key definitions (File 19.1) are the source of truth. Write-back for programmatic key assignment is research-required.

dataSources.description: VistA user key assignments from File 200 KEYS field — read-only mirror.
VistA security key definitions from File 19.1 — read-only reference.
